title: do_parallel command
description: Execute multiple commands in parallel each tick and aggregate their results.
markdownDescription: Execute multiple commands *in parallel* each tick and aggregate their results.

prefixItems.title: do_parallel command
prefixItems.description: Execute multiple commands in parallel each tick and aggregate their results.

commands.title: Parallel Commands
commands.description: List of [command_name, command_params] pairs to execute every tick.
commands.markdownDescription: List of `[command_name, command_params]` pairs to execute every tick.

returns.title: Result Mapping
returns.description: Maps the concatenated first-letter results of each command (e.g. 'SS', 'SF') to SUCCESS, FAILURE, or RUNNING.
returns.markdownDescription: Maps the concatenated first-letter results of each command (e.g. `'SS'`, `'SF'`) to `SUCCESS`, `FAILURE`, or `RUNNING`.

ticks.title: Tick Intervals
ticks.description: List of tick intervals per command â€” run command N every ticks[N] ticks. null means every tick.
ticks.markdownDescription: List of tick intervals per command. `null` means every tick.

defaults.title: Default Results
defaults.description: Default CommandStatus string for each command when it is not called on a given tick.
defaults.markdownDescription: Default `CommandStatus` string for each command when it is not called on a given tick.
